---
title: "**Meeting with Kenyan High Commissioner: Thursday, 25th June 2026**"
date: 2026-06-23
author: "Linus Chirchir"
image: /events/images/edinburgh-futures-institute.jpg
image-alt: "Edinburgh Futures Institute, venue for the meeting with the Kenyan High Commissioner"
categories: [Community, Networking, Diplomacy]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Meeting with Kenyan High Commissioner

Join us for a community meeting with the Kenyan High Commissioner, [H.E. Amb. Maurice Makoloo](https://www.kenyahighcom.org.uk/message-from-the-high-commission){target="_blank"} bringing together Kenyans based in Scotland for an opportunity to connect, engage, and strengthen community links.

## 🗓️ Date
**Thursday, 25th June 2026**

## ⏰ Time
**12:30 PM – 2:00 PM**

## 📍 Location
**Edinburgh Futures Institute**  
Room 1.04 (Room 1.40 may be used if numbers increase)

## 🤝 About the Meeting

This meeting provides an opportunity to meet the Kenyan High Commissioner and fellow Kenyans based in Scotland. It will be a valuable space for conversation, networking, and strengthening connections between the Kenyan community and the High Commission.

## 📝 Arrangement

The meeting has been arranged by [Prof Liz Grant](https://uoe-global-health.ed.ac.uk/our-people/secretariat-and-senior-fellows/liz-grant){target="_blank"}, with the invitation coordinated by [Kevin Donovan](https://www.sps.ed.ac.uk/staff/kevin-donovan){target="_blank"}.

---

We look forward to a productive and engaging meeting.
